announcement.text: Safely from mother to mother. Salutbabe is live

hero.subtitle: Turnkey software and custom AI solutions that drive real business impact.

item1.label: Projects Delivered
item1.desc: Successfully launched robust web and mobile applications.

item2.label: Faster Time-to-Market
item2.desc: Our pre-built AI modules accelerate your product launch.

item3.label: Client Satisfaction
item3.desc: Long-term partnerships built on trust and delivery.

item4.label: Dedicated Support
item4.desc: Continuous monitoring and maintenance for your systems.

security.title1: Your ideas are safe with us.
security.desc: We understand the value of your intellectual property. Our enterprise-grade architecture ensures that your ideas, data, and code are fully protected and exclusively yours.
security.button: Discover our legal and security standards

strategy.desc: Your team focuses on what differentiates you. We deliver the operational technology and AI infrastructure. No silos. No reinventing the wheel. Just seamless execution.

compounding.desc: Most agencies deliver a project and leave. We build a lasting technology ecosystem. Your first MVP goes live in weeks. Your next feature takes days.
compounding.point: Incremental solutions take less time and perform better because your technical foundation keeps getting stronger.
compounding.highlight: Why do 96% of our clients stay for their next project? Because we deliver results—without locking you in.

pricing.title: Flexible plans for digital builders
pricing.subtitle: From integrating robust AI models to fully custom turnkey software, we scale with your operational needs.

tier1.title: AI Consulting & Strategy
tier1.desc: Strategic roadmap and architectural planning for your AI transformation.

tier2.title: Custom AI Integration
tier2.desc: Seamlessly integrate specialized AI models into your existing systems.

tier3.title: Turnkey Software
tier3.desc: End-to-end custom software and AI product development from scratch.

integrations.desc: Deep interoperability across ERPs, CRMs, cloud platforms, data warehouses, and legacy systems. We build to fit your existing ecosystem.

cta.desc: Tell us your hardest, highest-stakes operational challenge. We’ll provide a production-grade technology solution in weeks.

footer.desc: AI-powered platform providing turnkey software solutions including web, mobile, backend systems, and specialized AI services.
